reviews.comment:
Muy buenas instalaciones. Detalle, los baños están cerrados con llave y hay que solicitar como cliente que los abran. Consecuencia del descuido general y el mal uso de las instalaciones ajenas.

(Translated by Google)
Very good facilities. A small detail: the bathrooms are locked, and you, as a guest, have to request them to be opened. This is a consequence of general neglect and misuse of other people's facilities.
